(radd) to send back; to bring back, take back (ه‎ , ھـ‎ الى‎ s. o., s. th. to); to return (ھـ‎ الى‎ s. th. to its place), put back, lay back ( ھـ‎ الى‎ s. th. in its place); to throw back, repel, drive back, drive away (ه‎ s. o.); to resist, oppose (ه‎ s. o.); to turn down, refuse, decline (ھـ‎ s. th., e. g., the fulfillment of a wish); to ward off, parry, repel (ھجوما‎ hujūman an attack); to reject (تھمة‎ tuhmatan a suspicion); to hand back, give back, return, restore (ھـ‎ s. th., الى‎ to s. o.); to return (السلام‎ as-salāma the greeting); to reply (على‎ to s. o.), answer (على‎ s. o.); to reflect (ھـ‎ light); to throw back, echo (ھـ‎ the voice); to refute, disprove (على‎ s. th.); to hold back, keep, restrain (ه‎ عن‎ s. o. from s. th.); to dissuade (ه‎ عن‎ s. o. from), prevail upon s. o. (ه‎) not to do s. th. (عن‎); to trace back, attribute (ھـ‎ الى‎ s. th. to an origin); to bring, yield ( على‎ ھـ‎ s. th. to s. o.); to reappoint, reinstate (ه‎ ه‎ s. o. as, e. g., حاكما‎ ḥākiman as governor) ;الباب‎ رد‎ to close the door; جوابا‎ رد‎ (jawāban) to answer; ما‎ شيئا‎ عليك‎ ھذا‎ يرد‎ this won’t ‎help you at ‎all; يرد‎ لا‎ (yuraddu) irrefutable; عقبيه‎ على‎ رده‎ (‘aqibaih) pl. اعقابھم‎ على‎ ردھم‎ (a‘qābihim) to drive s. o. back to where he came from; عنه‎ عينه‎ رد‎ (‘ainahū) he averted his eyes from it
